summary_intro_strong: I am a developer with nearly five years of experience building web applications based on React and TypeScript.
summary_intro: In my most recent project, I worked within a Scrum framework, designing the architecture of an application built with Next.js, styled it with Tailwind based on Figma mockups, wrote unit tests in Jest, and managed the GitHub repository.
summary_paragraph_2: I write clean, scalable and maintainable code, streamline workflows with AI agents, and keep my focus on product-oriented solutions — user needs and business goals.
summary_paragraph_3: I have experience in commercial team projects as well as independent design and deployment of websites.
summary_paragraph_4: Outside of work I enjoy electronics, technology, science, and designing raster and vector graphics — such as invitations and stickers.
